visa_types.name: Austrian National Visa - Type D
visa_types.documents_required:
Please refer to below checklist as per your purpose of visit.
 Visa for Gainful Employment

 Exchange Student Visa

 Visa for picking up your residence permit

 Researcher Visa

 Language course Visa 
Working Holiday Visa
visa_types.visa_fees:
There is a service charge of EUR 29.92 (inclusive of VAT) per visa application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants.
 

[Table:Austrian National Visa - Type D]
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee, in Korea Won, is as per the current exchange rate and is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fees can be paid by Cash only and are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
If you intend to stay in Austria for more than 90 days and for up to six months (tourism, business trip, student exchange) per year and you are neither EU or EFTA citizen, you require
                                                                            an Austrian National Visa – TYPE D. 
According to the Schengen Visa Codex the holder of a national visa issued by Austria or one of the Schengen-countries is entitled to travel the other Schengen-countries for a maximum
                                                                            of 90 days within a 6 months period (i.e. the maximum validity of the Austrian visa type D) during the validity of the national visa and after the visa has expired. 
The National visa D is not a work permit!
For the Working Holiday Visa or an Austrian Job Seeker visa you will need to apply directly at the Embassy of Austria in Seoul.
As a general rule, once a Schengen visa application is submitted, a decision is taken within 15 calendar days. This period may be extended under special circumstances up to 45days.
Once you have lodged your application a decision will be made solely through the Embassy.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If you intend to stay in Austria for more than 90 days and for up to six months (tourism, business trip, student exchange) per year and you are neither EU or EFTA citizen, you require
                                                                            an Austrian National Visa – TYPE D. 
According to the Schengen Visa Codex the holder of a national visa issued by Austria or one of the Schengen-countries is entitled to travel the other Schengen-countries for a maximum
                                                                            of 90 days within a 6 months period (i.e. the maximum validity of the Austrian visa type D) during the validity of the national visa and after the visa has expired. 
The National visa D is not a work permit!
For the Working Holiday Visa or an Austrian Job Seeker visa you will need to apply directly at the Embassy of Austria in Seoul.
As a general rule, once a Schengen visa application is submitted, a decision is taken within 15 calendar days. This period may be extended under special circumstances up to 45days.
Once you have lodged your application a decision will be made solely through the Embassy.

## Visa Fees
There is a service charge of EUR 29.92 (inclusive of VAT) per visa application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants.
 

[Table:Austrian National Visa - Type D]
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee, in Korea Won, is as per the current exchange rate and is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fees can be paid by Cash only and are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Please refer to below checklist as per your purpose of visit.
 Visa for Gainful Employment

 Exchange Student Visa

 Visa for picking up your residence permit

 Researcher Visa

 Language course Visa 
Working Holiday Visa

## Photo Specifications

- Latest photograph not older than 3 months
- Size 35 mm x 45 mm
- Light background
- Taken without headgear
- Head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant’s face
- Picture has to be taken from the front
Please note that photographs should meet the above mentioned specifications.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
 Visa Application Form 
How to download the form:

                                                                            The application form is in PDF format.

                                                                            To download the PDF file, Adobe Acrobat Reader is required. To download it, please click here (http://get.adobe.com/reader/). 

To download the visa application form:
- Click the ”Visa Application Form” above.
- When the form opens, please save it in your computer.
Or
- Place your mouse on the “Visa Application Form” and click the right button of the mouse.
- Among the selections, choose “Save target as”.
- Save the visa application form naming the file in your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A Schengen visa is valid for 27 Schengen member states and is for short stay for a maximum period of ninety days within a six months period. A Schengen visa allows the holder to travel freely across the Schengen member states.
The following 26 countries have implemented the Schengen Agreement: Austria, Belgium, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Iceland, Italy, Croatia, Latvia, Lichtenstein, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Slovak Republic, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden and Switzerland.
A Schengen visa can only be applied for at least two weeks in advanceand up to six months prior to your entry into the country. 
As a general rule, once a Schengen visa application is submitted, a decision is taken within 15 calendar days. This period may be extended under special circumstances up to 45 days.
Once you have lodged your application a decision will be made solely through the Embassy.
DO YOU NEED A SCHENGEN VISA?

[Table:Schengen Visa - Type C]

## Overview
A Schengen visa is valid for 27 Schengen member states and is for short stay for a maximum period of ninety days within a six months period. A Schengen visa allows the holder to travel freely across the Schengen member states.
The following 26 countries have implemented the Schengen Agreement: Austria, Belgium, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Iceland, Italy, Croatia, Latvia, Lichtenstein, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Slovak Republic, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden and Switzerland.
A Schengen visa can only be applied for at least two weeks in advanceand up to six months prior to your entry into the country. 
As a general rule, once a Schengen visa application is submitted, a decision is taken within 15 calendar days. This period may be extended under special circumstances up to 45 days.
Once you have lodged your application a decision will be made solely through the Embassy.
DO YOU NEED A SCHENGEN VISA?

[Table:Schengen Visa - Type C]

## Visa Fees
There is a service charge of EUR 29.92 (inclusive of VAT) per visa application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants

- The applicable visa fee, in Korea Won, is as per the current exchange rate and is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fees can be paid by Cash only and are non-refundable.

## Documents Required

Business trips / conference attendance / attendance at other events

Visa for Gainful Employment

## Photo Specifications

- Latest photograph not older than 3 months
- Size 35 mm x 45 mm
- Light background
- Taken without headgear
- Head coverings and hats are only acceptable due to religious beliefs, and even then, may not cover any portion of the applicant’s face
- Picture has to be taken from the front
Please note that photographs should meet the above mentioned specifications.

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
Visa Application Form 
How to download the form:

                                                                        The application form is in PDF format.

                                                                        To download the PDF file, Adobe Acrobat Reader is required. To download it, please click here (http://get.adobe.com/reader/). 

To download the visa application form:

- When the form opens, please save it in your computer.
Or

- Save the visa application form naming the file in your computer.
